text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Um, what was it again? I was up until morning
with the preparations...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't afford to halt my thoughts in the middle
of my research...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But, it's fine... You're the test subject after all.
There won't be... any problems.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is constantly dozing off. It
appears she hasn't gotten enough rest.
